name: code-reviewer
description: Reviews code for quality, security issues, and style violations. Use this skill when asked to review, audit, check, or analyze code — including pull requests, individual files, or entire modules. Activates for queries like "review this code", "check for security issues", "audit my PR", "find bugs in", "lint", "look for code smells", or "is this implementation correct". Can also run static analysis scripts directly on local files.

name: knowledge-retriever
description: Retrieves information from internal documentation and web search.

name: skill-publish
description: Validates, tests, and publishes a skill to a registry.

name: testcase-skill
description: Generates and runs test cases for a given function or module. Use this skill when asked to write tests, generate test coverage, or validate code correctness. Activates for queries like "write tests for", "generate test cases", "add test coverage".
